arts.ttl: Arne Slot aims a thinly-veiled dig at his Liverpool predecessor Jurgen Klopp and claims he'd be a 'STUPID manager' if he thought 12:30 kick-offs were more difficult
arts.sum: Slot's assessment is a departure from the stance taken by former Reds boss Jurgen Klopp , who famously railed against his side's frequent selection for that fixture slot.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot identifies the key to Liverpool’s title bid after struggle under Jurgen Klopp
arts.sum: Slot has spotted the major difference between Liverpool and champions Manchester City last season

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace boss Oliver Glasner makes frustration clear after Eberechi Eze decision
arts.sum: Crystal Palace boss claims Eberechi Eze has been "fantastic" despite the South London club sitting in the bottom three, with his side's No.10 having been left out of the England squad

arts.ttl: Arne Slot's simple solution for how Liverpool can close gap on Man City and win title
arts.sum: Liverpool are looking to close the gap on Manchester City from last season and Arne Slot knows what will be crucial if they are to do fight for the Premier League title

arts.ttl: Glasner outlines key tenets of support and togetherness at the club
arts.sum: Speaking in his pre-Liverpool press conference, the manager revealed how much support Matheus França is getting in his recovery from injury.

arts.ttl: Oliver Glasner explains managing Crystal Palace midfielder’s injury problem with England withdrawal likely
arts.sum: “If he plays, he’s fully fit,” said Glasner. But, if he plays, he’s fit.

arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah shows true Liverpool colours after Arne Slot contract comments
arts.sum: Latest Liverpool news with superstar forward Mohamed Salah working hard away from Anfield and the training pitch

arts.ttl: Oliver Glasner Shares Adam Wharton Injury Update Ahead of Liverpool Clash
arts.sum: Crystal Palace manager Oliver Glasner revealed that Adam Wharton is still struggling for fitness ahead of the Eagles' weekend clash against Liverpool.

arts.ttl: Arsenal, Liverpool suffer fatal transfer blow as six-year contract 'agreed'
arts.sum: Newcastle United's Anthony Gordon reportedly agrees a new six-year contract with the Magpies, ending speculation over his future amid interest from Arsenal and Liverpool.

arts.ttl: Report: Liverpool eye Bundesliga star as Mohamed Salah replacement
arts.sum: Liverpool have scouted Borussia Dortmund winger Karim Adeyemi and are prepared to pay up to €50m (£41.9m) in a future transfer, according to a report. Liverpool are said to have sent scouts to watch the Germany international in the Bundesliga and have outlined the €50m transfer fee they are willing to pay to secure a deal.
